hero.title: Kutachikiza
hero.lead: IATF yakulingila mu chihela cha atu eswe. yiyulo ya mulimo, kwalumuna code, kwalumuka mu usongwelo, ni ndando ja mulimo kakusonekena ha chihela chacho. Chihanda chino chinasolola kuze ndando yeswe ya mikanda yakutwama ni chize mutu mahasa kuyitanga.

items: Kukwata yiyulo ya mulimo. Jishimbi jakutambula mikanda, ni jishimbi jakusoneka mikanda, jize jizeji kusoloka mu mikanda, nawa jize jinashimutwila mu mikanda ya usongwelo. chijimbikilo... hanji hanji .

Yipula mikanda. Sango ja akwa-kufupila jili mu IATF GitHub, ha site yino, hanji ha mashimbu eswe aali. Sango jili ha kufupila, kunyonga, hanji kuhehwojola sango ja uputukilo, hanga atu ahase kulilongesa chakuhona kusolola sango ja mutu.
Maliji kakwalumuka. Sango lieswe jize akwalumuna kakupwa sango lia mbunga ya usongwelo. Tala mukanda wa IATF Chizavu cha GitHub... hanji hanji .
Kuhinduka mu usongwelo. Kuzangamisa ha mutamba wa chiyulo chakusongwela kakulondezewa ngwe kupanjika ku chiwanyino cha usongwelo. site ya IATF Usongwelo wa maliji. Kulinga chijimbikilo ha GitHub.
Ndando ja kukalakala. IATF kakutwama ni mbongo jinji jize anafwisa, nawa kakusonekena nawa ndando ja mashimbu eswe jize akufwisa.
Yisoneko ya usongwelo. Kuhehwojola ha kuhengwola chipwe kukwata chiyulo chili ha GitHub Kuhanjika ha chijimbikilo chilemu tala Kuhanjika Ku chihanda cha site ya IATF Sango lia maliji.

paragraphs: IATF kakusa tachi hanga yikungulwila ya mbunga yihete. Kuheta mu mwaka wa 2022, ndando jinene jize akuzachisa jili jina lia chifuchi (domain name).
Chisoneko chino hi chisoneko cha mbongo yize akutalako ko, alioze chili chijimbikilo cha mbongo jize akuzachisa ha kukalakala cha IATF.
operatingCosts.footnote: Akwa-kufweta, ni sango jize jakufweta atu, ni shimbi jize jili mu mikanda ya kuyula, keshi kuasoneka ha mikanda ya atu.

items.label: Kutachikiza
items.value: Hachino, mulimo wacho wahilukile kufuma ku Vercel kuya ku Cloudflare ni kuputuka kuzachisa mashimbu akehe. iatf.cc Chihela chacho.

items.label: Kutachikiza
items.value: Ndando ya jina lia mu site yakufwetela kuli mugiwarafx.

items.label: Kutachikiza
items.value: Hashi ya jina lia mu site yakufwetela kuli mugiwarafx.

items.label: Kutachikiza
items.value: Ndando ya jina lia mu site yakufwetela kuli mugiwarafx.

items.label: Kutachikiza
items.value: Ndalama jakufweta jina liacho jafumine kuli mugiwarafx.

header.title: Yuma yize kuyishi ya atu eswe

paragraphs: Yuma yimwe kakuyisoneka mu mikanda ya mbunga ni nyonga liacho:
items: Usongwelo wa kulita ni atu waze akulondezeze.
Mikanda ya usoko yize akuzachisa wika hanga alumbunune kanawa yize akufupa shimbu kanda akutayiza, kuhana, hanji kuhitulula.
Adres, ni numero ja telefone, ni yuma yikwo yize kuyishi ni ulemu.
Yuma yeswe yize muyihasa kunyingika mutu yoze wakuzachisa makina a kukwasa chakuhona kutayiza.
Kuhanjika cha Raw Discord, ndo muze sango limwe liakusosomba mu mukanda wa mulimo wa mbunga.

header.title: Chiyulo chili mukanda wa shimbi uze uli kusongo lia mikanda yino

paragraphs: Nyi mufupa kunyingika chize milimo yakutambula, ni kuyifunga, hanji kuyilongesa, tangenu mukwa-kuyula.
